mapper.select: SELECT id, subject_id, username, nickname, phone, email, status FROM customer_account WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer_account WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer_account ( subject_id, username, nickname, avatar_url, phone, email, password_hash, must_change_password, status, source, auth_version, password_changed_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES (#{subjectId}, #{username}, #{nickname}, NULL, #{phone}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{mustChangePassword}, 'active', 'local', 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3))
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM customer_account WHERE username = #{username} OR phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
